name: Tenora
description: Unload percussive machine gun fire, or strike a heavy chord with a single charge shot. When Octavia wields her signature rifle alt-fire Headshot Kills have a chance to instantly refill the magazine.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Unload percussive machine gun fire, or strike a heavy chord with a single charge shot. When Octavia wields her signature rifle alt-fire Headshot Kills have a chance to instantly refill the magazine.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Octavia Prime: Hotfix 29.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Tenora Prime asking for the wrong item when unlocking the Exilus slot.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Tenora in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased Tenora’s magazine size from 50 to 70.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Host/Client Damage value discrepancies when using the Tenora's Alt Fire on Grineer Earth tileset enemies.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Improved the Tenora’s reload animation by tweaking the clip to now spawn and drop to the floor.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
A high tempo rifle. Choose between automatic and semi automatic fire to lay waste to your enemies. Its primary fire rewards increased accuracy and fire rate with consistent shooting. Its alt fire will load up 10 ammo before being shot in a single blow. The Tenora can be purchased in the Market for Platinum or researched in the Tenno Lab Dojo room.
This fan hammer pistol, like the Tenora, also has two firing modes. Its semi-automatic primary fire will please sharpshooters. Its alt fire packs a punch (several) by emptying its entire clip in one trigger pull, but hold steady, the shots also have some kick to them. The Pandero can be purchased in the Market for Platinum or you can purchase its Blueprint in the Market for crafting.
Javlok, Buzlok, Ferrox, Harpak, Hind, Mutalist Quanta, Penthera, Paracyst, Penta, Quanta (Vandal), Stradavar, Tenora, Zarr
